summary: Frontend testing for carousel removal and linear stacked layout - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) No carousel controls/wraparound navigation, (2) Input/prompt composer at top above response panels, (3) Three stacked response boxes with 3 selected models, (4) Responses render correctly in stacked panels after sending prompt. Tested on both Desktop and Mobile viewports.
critical_code_review_comments: Linear stack mode correctly implemented with 'selectedModels.map()' rendering all panels vertically
Input shell uses 'order-1' CSS class while response shell uses 'order-2' - ensuring input appears first in flexbox layout
Stack layout hint text 'Linear stack mode enabled • no carousel wraparound' displayed correctly
No carousel navigation buttons (ChevronLeft/ChevronRight buttons removed from UI, though imported)
Each panel has correct height of 75vh (GALAXY_PANEL_DEFAULT_VH constant)
Page extends vertically to accommodate all selected models
seed_data_creation: Created test user and session in MongoDB for authentication
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified carousel removal and linear stacked layout changes. ChatPage.js now renders all selected models in vertical stack without carousel controls. Input is positioned above response panels using CSS flexbox order. Session token 'test_session_1773156270876' can be reused for authenticated testing.

carousel_removal_tests.details: No carousel navigation buttons found. Text 'Linear stack mode enabled • no carousel wraparound' displayed. ChevronLeft/ChevronRight icons imported but not used in navigation UI.

input_position_tests.details: Desktop: Input shell Y=149, Response shell Y=287 (input above responses). Mobile: Input shell Y=209, Response shell Y=347 (input above responses).

stacked_panels_tests.details: With 3 models selected (gpt-5.2, claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929, gemini-3-flash-preview), 3 stacked response panels visible. Each panel has 810px height. Panels accessible by vertical scrolling.

prompt_response_tests.details: Sent test prompt 'Hello, this is a test prompt. Please respond briefly.' All 3 models responded: gpt-5.2 (#3), claude (#5), gemini (#7). Responses rendered correctly in their respective stacked panels.

mobile_viewport_tests.details: Mobile viewport (390x844) tested. Input at top, 3 stacked panels, no carousel controls. Layout adapts correctly for mobile.
